description.description: The description that was provided when uploading the certificate.

extension.description: The file format of the certificate, as indicated by the file extension. For example, **.cert** or **.pem**.

id.description: The unique identifier of the certificate.

name.description: The file name of the certificate. For example, **mycert**.

notAfter.description: The date when the certificate stops to be valid.

notBefore.description: The date when the certificate starts to be valid.
